_publications._publicationTitle: FAP expression as a marker of malignant transformation enabling in vivo characterization in peripheral nerve sheath tumors: a multimodal and translational study.

_contextSnippet: the MPNST on the left forearm shows high [18F]FDG uptake and high FAP expression (SUVmax 10.7 vs. 14.7)...neurofibroma in the left forearm shows high [18F]FDG uptake and FAP expression uptake (SUVmax 6.8 vs. 3.5)
details: Demonstrated excellent concordance with histologically confirmed malignancy in NF-1 patient, showing high uptake in confirmed MPNSTs (SUVmax 14.7) and low uptake in benign neurofibroma (SUVmax 3.5)
